title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer (Software-Focused)
score_reasoning: Your backend and distributed systems expertise align well with the infrastructure engineering focus, and the tech stack (AWS, Kubernetes, Python, Go, Terraform) matches your core strengths. However, the role explicitly requires Kubernetes proficiency, which you lack beyond basic Docker experience—a meaningful gap for a senior infrastructure position that designs and operates stateful systems. The Warsaw office with office-centric hybrid (Mon/Tue/Thu in-office) creates a notable geographic friction; while you accept hybrid with local-Berlin anchoring, Warsaw requires relocation or cross-border commuting, which your preferences score materially lower. The role's emphasis on SRE principles and operational excellence does align with your observability and system reliability focus.

red_flags: Kubernetes is core requirement—you have only basic Docker experience
Hybrid role anchored to Warsaw office—not your base city; requires cross-border flexibility
On-call rotation expected—role focuses heavily on operational overhead
Limited evidence of SRE-specific incident response patterns in your CV
